hooks.command: read -r line; fp=$(echo "$line" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$fp" in "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/_layouts/report.html"|"$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/_layouts/default.html"|"$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/_includes/scripts.html") node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/check-html-js.mjs" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/_layouts/report.html" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/_layouts/default.html" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/_includes/scripts.html" ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac

read -r line; cmd=$(echo "$line" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -Eq 'git[[:space:]]+(-c[[:space:]]+\S+[[:space:]]+)*commit\b'; then node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/validate-report.mjs"; else exit 0; fi
